Rodrigo Roa Duterte, First State of the Nation Address, July 25, 2016

STATE OF THE NATION ADDRESS OF
RODRIGO ROA DUTERTE

Thank you. Please allow me a little bit of informality at the outset.

We cannot move forward if we allow the past to pull us back.

At this point, there are concerns few I wish to convey.

Thus to our religious, bishops, leaders, let me assure you.
